app.name: Streak Calendar
app.description: Track your habits and improve your life

home.title:
Track Your Habits,
Build Better Routines
home.subtitle: Simple, visual habit tracking that helps you build consistency and achieve your goals. Don't break the chain and watch your streaks grow.

calendar.title: Your Calendars
calendar.noCalendars: No calendars found. Create one to get started!
calendar.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
calendar.deleteCalendarConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete {calendarName}? All habits and their completion history will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Streak Calendar, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

license.title: 2. Use License
license.content: Permission is granted to temporarily use Streak Calendar for personal, non-commercial purposes. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title.

userData.title: 3. User Data
userData.content: You retain all rights to your data. We collect and process data as outlined in our Privacy Policy. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.

about.title: About Streak Calendar
about.description: Streak Calendar is a simple yet powerful habit tracking tool based on the "Don't Break the Chain" method popularized by Jerry Seinfeld. The concept is simple: mark an X for each day you complete a habit, creating an unbroken chain that motivates you to maintain your streak.

features.description: Built with modern web technologies including Next.js, Convex, and Clerk, Streak Calendar helps you visualize your progress and stay motivated through:

list.calendar: Visual calendar view of your habits

steps.step1: Create an account to get started
steps.step2: Add habits you want to track

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email, and habit tracking data. We also collect usage data to improve our service.

usage.title: 2. Information Usage
usage.content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, and ensure a personalized experience.

security.title: 3. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

habits.noHabits: No habits found. Create one to get started!
habits.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
habits.hasBeenDeleted: has been removed from your habits
habits.deleteHabitConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete {habitName}? This action cannot be undone.
